config.toggle-key.name: Activation Key
config.toggle-key.tooltip: Each local player controls their own drone through their assigned keyboard or controller.
config.active.name: Enabled by Default
config.active.tooltip: Used the first time a player loads this mod; their choice is saved separately afterwards.
config.rotation-speed.name: Rotation Speed
config.rotation-speed.tooltip: Lower values make the drone orbit faster.
config.radius.name: Rotation Radius
config.radius.tooltip: The radius of the drone's orbit in pixels.
config.damage.name: Damage
config.damage.tooltip: Set to -1 to deal 120% of the target's current health.
config.projectile-velocity.name: Projectile Velocity
config.projectile-velocity.tooltip: Pixels moved per game update; 0 stops the projectile and negative values reverse it.
